task.instruction: Go past the first streetlamp, then turn until you see the black car, then go to the black car, then turn toward the red car and go to the red car. Finally, land in front of the traffic light pole on the right.

ltl_plan.ltl_nl_formula: F pi_6 & (!pi_6 U pi_5) & (!pi_5 U pi_4) & (!pi_4 U pi_3) & (!pi_3 U pi_2) & (!pi_2 U pi_1)

pi_predicates.pi_2: Turn until you see the black car
pi_predicates.pi_6: Land in front of the traffic light pole on the right

override_history.reasoning: Checkpoint thinks complete, verifying at convergence. Reasoning: The diary says the first streetlamp shifted from near center to the left edge as the drone moved closer, which is strong evidence the drone has just moved past it. Raw: {"complete":true,"completion_percentage":1.0,"should_stop":false,"reasoning":"The diary says the first streetlamp shifted from near center to the left edge as the drone moved closer, which is strong evidence the drone has just moved past it."}
